final:
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    input D_N,
    output X
);assign X = ~(A & B & C & D_N);

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      X <= 1'b1; if (A | B | C | ~D_N) begin X <= 1'b0; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: X <= 1'b1; if (A | B | C | ~D_N) begin X <= 1'b0; end
